transport.authentication: host-only session; RPC reads additionally admit Cap public-view policy
transport.mutation_safety: same-origin CSRF proof plus D1 idempotency receipt

operations.input: Effect Request payload is one 15-character video ID
operations.success: Effect Option<UploadProgress>; absent row is None; dates are ISO strings; nullable messages are Effect Options; rawFileKey controls hasRawFallback
operations.authorization: owner bypass; otherwise explicit shared-organization/shared-space membership or public video, with video/space password candidates and public email restriction enforced

operations.input: Effect Request payload is one 15-character video ID
operations.success: Effect Option<{fileName,downloadUrl}>; screenshots select newest supported suffix; webMP4 prefers nonempty result.mp4 then rawFileKey; desktopMP4 signs result.mp4
operations.authorization: same optional-session public-view policy as GetUploadProgress
operations.idempotency: read-only short-lived exact-key R2 GET capability

operations.input: {videoId,uploaded,total,updatedAt}; nonnegative safe integers and an ISO Date
operations.success: Effect boolean true; uploaded is min(uploaded,total); updates with an older updatedAt are successful no-ops
operations.idempotency: Effect request id plus request digest; insert races replay

operations.success: {id,presignedPostData:null,uploadTarget:{type:'put',url,headers}}; existing owner video mints only a new exact-key capability
operations.normalization: R2 PUT replaces Cap S3 POST without widening authority; screenshot extension is png only for case-insensitive image/png, otherwise jpg; title is Cap <kind> - <day> <month> <year>
operations.authorization: live organization member, optional in-organization folder, owner-only reuse; free plan rejects duration above 300 seconds
operations.idempotency: required Frame carrier; the original signed response is replayed

operations.ordering: delete compatibility progress and persist storage_pending atomically, retry exact result.mp4 R2 delete up to three times, then mark complete
operations.idempotency: required Frame carrier; pending retries resume the same object intent

operations.authorization: source-corrected from catalog inference to required session owner
operations.idempotency: read-only short-lived exact result.mp4 GET capability; no HEAD

operations.authorization: required session; owner, original-organization member, explicit shared-organization member, or shared-space member
operations.current_fence: desktopSegments or non-complete progress returns still-processing/failed message before R2 HEAD
operations.original_key: owner/video/source/original.mp4 retained beside native edit documents

operations.success: boolean indicating whether the exact edit progress row was deleted
operations.staleness: error immediately; complete/generating_thumbnail over 5m; processing 0% over 15m; other processing over 10m; uploading never
operations.authority: rawFileKey must equal owner/video/source/original.mp4 and the compared row snapshot must still match at delete time
operations.idempotency: required Frame carrier; result boolean is replayed

operations.semantics: atomically replace organization and space shares with selected IDs visible through the owner's active memberships; ignore foreign/missing selections; update legacy public only when supplied
operations.idempotency: required Frame carrier; request digest prevents key reuse with a different replacement set
